reasoning: This workout focuses on improving lactate clearance and fatigue resistance, targeting Koren's main limiter—a higher-than-desired power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. Given the extended rest since the last ride, we'll keep intensity controlled to moderately attack the limiter. This session is designed to prepare Koren for the sustained efforts required on the main climb of the Alpine Loop, particularly emulating parts of the Cascade Springs segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-min over-under intervals (3 min at 242-250W, 3 min at 201-218W), 2 min recovery spins at 209W.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
